queries.query: Write me a Nature cover letter for the paper in main.tex.
Help me draft a submission letter for my IEEE TPAMI manuscript at main.tex.
Check whether my cover letter overclaims compared to my LaTeX manuscript.
请帮我给这篇 LaTeX 论文写一份 Nature 投稿信。
Is this CVPR cover letter framed correctly, or should I retarget to TPAMI?
Polish my cover_letter.md for a NeurIPS submission, but keep it under 400 words.
Run a pre-submission readiness check on my Nature cover letter; what declarations am I missing?
I need an editor letter that summarizes the contributions in main.tex without exaggerating.
Act as a strict reviewer and write a peer-review report on my paper with major/minor issues.
Gate-check my submission and tell me whether the paper itself is ready to send.
Proofread my IEEE conference paper main.tex and tighten the abstract.
Search my references.bib for Mamba forecasting papers after 2024.
Help me write a Typst-formatted cover letter from main.typ.
Draft a tailored cover letter for a software engineer job application at a startup.
Help me write a vacation request email to my manager.
Reply to reviewers point-by-point for my rebuttal letter.
